case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. OLIVIA GUADALUPE COVARRUBIAS OSUNA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $957.82 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT OSUNA, OLIVIA GUADALUPE COVARRUBIAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED FEB-10-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT OSUNA, OLIVIA GUADALUPE COVARRUBIAS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT OSUNA, OLIVIA GUADALUPE COVARRUBIAS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC, REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OLIVIA GUADALUPE COVARRUBIAS OSUNA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OSUNA, OLIVIA GUADALUPE COVARRUBIAS $957.82 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,037.82 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
